widgetTool.name: images_testing
widgetTool.description: Simple test to find out if images will render in the web widget at all

imageUris.description: A list of direct URLs to images displaying the product.

price.description: The current selling price of the product.

productId.description: The unique identifier for this specific product.

rating.description: The average aggregate user rating for the product, typically on a scale of 1.0 to 5.0. Leave null if no ratings exist.

count.description: The total number of individual user reviews received for this product.

reviewUri.description: The URL directing users to a dedicated page or section where they can read all customer reviews.

review.description: A summary object containing the total count of reviews and a link to read them. Leave null if no reviews exist.

subtitle.description: A longer, secondary line of text for additional context or description of the product.

title.description: Required. The primary name of the product as listed (e.g., "Men's Running Shoes").

uri.description: The URL directing users to the main product detail page on the website.
